task: Phase 1 durable runtime projection schema and repository
acceptance_criteria: A DB-backed append-only runtime projection exists for workflow activity, active state derivation, durable cursor storage, and first-class message agent identity, with schema and repository tests
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m pytest finance-agent-core/tests -q
notes: Owns schema, repository interfaces, projection semantics, and durable message agent ownership. No compatibility projection tables.

task: Phase 2 runtime event writer and projection ownership refactor
acceptance_criteria: LangGraph runtime events write to the new projection path in real time and do not rely on ad-hoc replay buffers for durable activity state
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m pytest finance-agent-core/tests -q
notes: Owns event adaptation, projection append semantics, and deterministic runtime write boundaries.

task: Phase 3 durable thread snapshot and activity API redesign
acceptance_criteria: `/thread/{thread_id}` and related activity APIs restore the workspace entirely from checkpoints, durable projection, and persisted chat history, while converging toward LangChain/LangGraph thread/run restore concepts
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m pytest finance-agent-core/tests -q
notes: Owns durable snapshot DTOs and removes API dependence on replay-buffer-derived history.

acceptance_criteria: SSE emits named events with stable IDs, supports initial attach from `after_seq`, and supports reconnect from `Last-Event-ID` without whole-buffer replay
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m pytest finance-agent-core/tests -q
notes: Owns transport contract, keepalive strategy, duplicate handling, initial cursor attach, reconnect resume tests, and standards-aligned SSE behavior.

acceptance_criteria: The frontend restores from durable snapshot first, resumes from cursor second, and derives active agent/process display from durable runtime truth
validation_command: cd frontend && npm run test && npm run typecheck
notes: Owns hook/reducer/page rewrite and selected-agent behavior. No dual restore path.

task: Phase 6 legacy replay-path removal and end-to-end hardening
acceptance_criteria: Legacy replay-buffer-based restore code is deleted, end-to-end refresh/reconnect/completed-thread validation passes, and deployment assumptions for HTTP/2 plus retention/TTL are documented and checked
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m pytest finance-agent-core/tests -q && cd frontend && npm run test && npm run typecheck
notes: Owns final cleanup, import hygiene, contract sync, and production-hardening checks.
